name: Fullmetal Alchemist: Brotherhood
synopsis: After a horrific alchemy experiment goes wrong, brothers Edward and Elric search for the Philosopher's Stone to restore what they lost.

name: Steins;Gate
synopsis: Self-proclaimed mad scientist Okabe Rintaro discovers microwave-based time travel and faces impossible choices.

name: Gintama°
synopsis: Odd jobs trio Gintoki, Shinpachi, and Kagura take on any task in an alternate-history Edo under alien occupation.

name: Shingeki no Kyojin Season 3 Part 2
synopsis: Eren and the Scouts race to reclaim Wall Maria and uncover the truth behind the Titans.

name: Gintama'
synopsis: More absurd missions and heartfelt arcs for the Yorozuya in neo-Edo.

name: Hunter x Hunter (2011)
synopsis: Gon Freecss follows his father's path to become a Hunter and explore a world of Nen, exams, and Chimera Ants.

name: Gintama': Enchousen
synopsis: Continuation arcs blending comedy and serious shounen battles.

name: Ginga Eiyuu Densetsu
synopsis: Epic space opera between the Galactic Empire and the Free Planets Alliance.

name: Gintama.
synopsis: Silver Soul arc begins as the series heads toward its finale.

name: Death Note
synopsis: Light Yagami finds a notebook that kills anyone whose name is written in it, drawing the genius L into a deadly game.

name: Kimi no Na wa.
synopsis: Two teenagers mysteriously swap bodies and search for each other across Japan.

name: Jujutsu Kaisen
synopsis: Yuji Itadori joins sorcerers to collect cursed fingers and battle deadly spirits.

name: Ousama Ranking: Yuuki no Takarabako
synopsis: Young prince Bojji proves his courage in a fairy-tale kingdom of giants and betrayal.

name: Monogatari Series: Second Season
synopsis: Interwoven arcs follow Koyomi and the girls through summer apparitions and emotional reckonings.

name: Clannad: After Story
genres: Drama, Romance, Slice of Life, Supernatural
synopsis: Tomoya and Nagisa navigate adulthood, family, and loss in a deeply emotional sequel.

name: Koe no Katachi
synopsis: A former bully reconnects with a deaf classmate he once tormented, seeking redemption.

name: Cowboy Bebop
synopsis: Bounty hunters Spike and Jet chase criminals across the solar system to a jazz soundtrack.

name: Shingeki no Kyojin
synopsis: Humanity hides from Titans behind walls until a colossal Titan breaches their world.

name: One Punch Man
synopsis: Saitama can defeat any foe with one punch—and struggles to find meaning in hero work.

name: Haikyuu!!
synopsis: Short volleyball player Hinata joins Karasuno High and aims for the nationals.

name: Boku no Hero Academia
synopsis: Quirkless Izuku Midoriya inherits One For All and trains at U.A. High.

name: Kimetsu no Yaiba
synopsis: Tanjiro becomes a demon slayer to save his sister Nezuko and avenge his family.

name: Violet Evergarden Movie
synopsis: Violet continues writing letters that help others express what words cannot.

name: One Piece
synopsis: Monkey D. Luffy sails the Grand Line with his crew to find the legendary One Piece.
